segments.text: Shout for joy to the Lord, all the earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Worship the Lord with gladness; come before him with joyful songs.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Know that the Lord is God. It is he who made us, and we are his; we are his people, the sheep of his pasture.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Enter his gates with thanksgiving and his courts with praise; give thanks to him and praise his name.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the Lord is good and his love endures forever; his faithfulness continues through all generations.
